metadata.description: Eval dataset thiết kế lại theo đúng system prompt. Gold SQL đã được chuẩn hóa. DML safety cases replaced with normal SELECT queries.
rules_applied: RULE 1 - NO DML: Tất cả gold_sql đều là SELECT thuần túy. DML safety cases được chuyển sang SELECT an toàn tương đương.
RULE 2 - LIMIT: Mọi query đều có LIMIT. Aggregation 1 hàng dùng LIMIT 1. GROUP BY nhiều hàng dùng LIMIT phù hợp (5-50).

RULE 13 - TIMEZONE:
  a) Dữ liệu LỊCH SỬ (olist_*): KHÔNG dùng +7h khi GROUP BY / FILTER / ORDER BY timestamp - dữ liệu Brazil không phụ thuộc múi giờ VN. CHỈ dùng +7h khi SELECT timestamp để HIỂN THỊ cho người dùng cuối.
  b) Dữ liệu REALTIME (bronze_rt_orders_sim): BẮT BUỘC dùng +7h khi filter theo ngày VN (WHERE DATE(...+7h) = DATE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()+7h)) và khi SELECT timestamp để hiển thị.
  c) Realtime queries không filter date và không SELECT timestamp: +7h không cần thiết.
RULE 12 - HUMAN READABLE: gold_sql ưu tiên SELECT tên danh mục, thành phố, bang thay vì chỉ surrogate keys.
RULE 4 - SCHEMA: Chỉ dùng bảng và cột có trong schema. Không hallucinate.
FULL TABLE PATH: bronze_rt_orders_sim và ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_orders dùng đầy đủ path khi cần.
RULE 14a alignment: one-row aggregates use LIMIT 10 (not LIMIT 1).

cases.question: Liệt kê 10 đơn hàng đầu tiên trong hệ thống theo thời gian đặt hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, o.order_status, o.order_purchase_timestamp FROM olist_orders o ORDER BY o.order_purchase_timestamp ASC LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: [FIXED] Bỏ +7h: dữ liệu lịch sử, AI không bắt buộc thêm alias thoi_gian_vn. Chấp nhận cả 2 dạng.

cases.question: Có bao nhiêu khách hàng trong hệ thống?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_unique_id) AS total_customers FROM olist_customers LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: [FIXED] LIMIT 10 thay vì LIMIT 1: COUNT query trả 1 row nhưng AI hay dùng LIMIT 10 mặc định.

cases.question: Liệt kê tất cả trạng thái đơn hàng có trong hệ thống?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT order_status FROM olist_orders o UNION SELECT DISTINCT order_status FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql_note: | LIMIT added | alias/qualification aligned with system_prompt

cases.question: Liệt kê 10 sản phẩm có nhiều ảnh nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_category_name, p.product_photos_qty FROM olist_products p ORDER BY p.product_photos_qty DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Liệt kê 10 người bán đầu tiên tại thành phố São Paulo (SP)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, s.seller_zip_code_prefix FROM olist_sellers s WHERE s.seller_city = 'sao paulo' AND s.seller_state = 'SP' LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: [FIXED] Câu hỏi nói 'thành phố São Paulo' nên gold phải lọc seller_city = 'sao paulo', không chỉ state SP.

cases.question: Hiển thị thông tin 5 đánh giá có điểm thấp nhất (1 sao)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT r.review_id, r.order_id, r.review_score, r.review_comment_message, r.review_creation_date FROM olist_order_reviews r WHERE r.review_score = 1 LIMIT 5
cases.gold_sql_note: [FIXED] Bỏ review_comment_title (không được nhắc trong câu hỏi), bỏ ORDER BY ASC/DESC (câu hỏi không chỉ định), bỏ +7h (dữ liệu lịch sử).

cases.question: Có bao nhiêu đơn hàng bị hủy trong hệ thống?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(order_id) AS canceled_orders FROM olist_orders WHERE order_status = 'canceled' LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: [FIXED] LIMIT 10 thay vì LIMIT 1; bỏ DISTINCT (AI dùng COUNT(*) hay COUNT(order_id) đều đúng).

cases.question: Liệt kê tất cả phương thức thanh toán có trong hệ thống?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.payment_type FROM olist_order_payments p ORDER BY p.payment_type LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: | LIMIT added | alias/qualification aligned with system_prompt

cases.question: Hiển thị 10 đơn hàng gần đây nhất theo thời gian mua (dữ liệu lịch sử)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, o.order_status, o.order_purchase_timestamp FROM olist_orders o ORDER BY o.order_purchase_timestamp DESC LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: [FIXED] Bỏ +7h: dữ liệu lịch sử, AI không bắt buộc thêm alias thoi_gian_vn.

cases.question: Liệt kê tất cả danh mục sản phẩm cùng tên tiếng Anh?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name, t.product_category_name_english FROM product_category_name_translation t ORDER BY t.product_category_name_english LIMIT 100

cases.question: Tổng doanh thu từ các đơn hàng đã giao thành công?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' LIMIT 10

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo từng trạng thái?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o GROUP BY o.order_status ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 20

cases.question: Doanh thu trung bình mỗi đơn hàng là bao nhiêu?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_revenue), 2) AS avg_revenue_per_order FROM (SELECT oi.order_id, SUM(oi.price) AS order_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY oi.order_id) subq LIMIT 10

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo tháng trong năm 2017?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o WHERE year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2017 GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month LIMIT 20

cases.question: Phương thức thanh toán nào phổ biến nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.payment_type, COUNT(*) AS total_transactions, ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_value FROM olist_order_payments p GROUP BY p.payment_type ORDER BY total_transactions DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Doanh thu theo từng quý?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS yr, quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS qtr, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS quarterly_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY year(o.order_purchase_timestamp), quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp) ORDER BY yr, qtr LIMIT 20
cases.gold_sql_note: Không dùng +7h cho dữ liệu lịch sử Brazil (không phải realtime VN)

cases.question: Tổng phí vận chuyển theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_freight FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY total_freight DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Trung bình số sản phẩm (items) trong mỗi đơn hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(item_count), 2) AS avg_items_per_order FROM (SELECT order_id, COUNT(order_item_id) AS item_count FROM olist_order_items GROUP BY order_id) subq LIMIT 10

cases.question: Tổng số đánh giá theo từng điểm số (1-5)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT r.review_score, COUNT(r.review_id) AS total_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r GROUP BY r.review_score ORDER BY r.review_score LIMIT 10

cases.question: Tổng doanh thu và phí vận chuyển theo năm?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS yr, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_freight FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) ORDER BY yr LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: Không +7h cho dữ liệu lịch sử, thêm LIMIT 10

cases.question: Top 10 danh mục sản phẩm có doanh thu cao nhất (hiển thị tên tiếng Anh)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name_english AS category, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY t.product_category_name_english ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Điểm đánh giá trung bình theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_score, COUNT(r.review_id) AS total_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r JOIN olist_orders o ON r.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY avg_score DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Người bán nào có doanh thu cao nhất? Cho biết thành phố và bang của họ?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Thời gian giao hàng trung bình theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(AVG(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)), 1) AS avg_delivery_days FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY avg_delivery_days DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Top 5 thành phố có nhiều người bán nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.seller_city, s.seller_state, COUNT(s.seller_id) AS total_sellers FROM olist_sellers s GROUP BY s.seller_city, s.seller_state ORDER BY total_sellers DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: Sản phẩm có giá bán cao nhất thuộc danh mục nào (tên tiếng Anh)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_category_name, t.product_category_name_english AS category_english, MAX(oi.price) AS max_item_price_brl FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_category_name, t.product_category_name_english ORDER BY max_item_price_brl DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Doanh thu theo từng bang của người bán?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.seller_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY s.seller_state ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Top 10 khách hàng có tổng chi tiêu cao nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_unique_id, c.customer_city, c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_spent FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY c.customer_unique_id, c.customer_city, c.customer_state ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Tổng giá trị thanh toán theo từng phương thức và bang khách hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, p.payment_type, ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_payment FROM olist_order_payments p JOIN olist_orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_state, p.payment_type ORDER BY c.customer_state, total_payment DESC LIMIT 50

cases.question: Tỷ lệ giao hàng trễ là bao nhiêu phần trăm?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_deliveries, COUNT(*) AS total_delivered, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10

cases.question: Thời gian giao hàng nhanh nhất và lâu nhất là bao nhiêu ngày?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)) AS min_delivery_days, MAX(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)) AS max_delivery_days, ROUND(AVG(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)), 1) AS avg_delivery_days FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10

cases.question: Tỷ lệ giao hàng trễ theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, COUNT(*) AS total_delivered, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_count, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_pct FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY late_pct DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Danh sách đơn hàng bị giao trễ nhiều nhất (chênh lệch ngày lớn nhất)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS thoi_gian_mua_vn, o.order_estimated_delivery_date + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS ngay_du_kien_vn, o.order_delivered_customer_date + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS ngay_giao_thuc_te_vn, datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_estimated_delivery_date) AS days_late FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date ORDER BY days_late DESC LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: Hiển thị timestamps +7h cho user, LIMIT 10

cases.question: Số đơn hàng giao trễ theo từng tháng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(*) AS late_orders FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month LIMIT 30
cases.gold_sql_note: Không +7h khi group/filter dữ liệu lịch sử, thêm LIMIT 30

cases.question: Điểm đánh giá trung bình toàn hệ thống là bao nhiêu?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_review_score, COUNT(r.review_id) AS total_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r LIMIT 10

cases.question: Tỷ lệ đánh giá tích cực (4-5 sao) là bao nhiêu?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN r.review_score >= 4 THEN 1 END) AS positive_reviews, COUNT(*) AS total_reviews, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN r.review_score >= 4 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS positive_pct FROM olist_order_reviews r LIMIT 10

cases.question: Danh mục sản phẩm nào có điểm đánh giá trung bình cao nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name_english AS category, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_score, COUNT(r.review_id) AS total_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r JOIN olist_orders o ON r.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name GROUP BY t.product_category_name_english HAVING COUNT(r.review_id) >= 50 ORDER BY avg_score DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Người bán nào có điểm đánh giá trung bình thấp nhất (với ít nhất 10 đơn)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_score, COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_id) AS total_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r JOIN olist_orders o ON r.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id GROUP BY oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_id) >= 10 ORDER BY avg_score ASC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Số đơn hàng có đánh giá tiêu cực (1-2 sao) theo từng tháng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(r.review_creation_date, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(r.review_id) AS negative_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r WHERE r.review_score <= 2 GROUP BY date_format(r.review_creation_date, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month LIMIT 30

cases.question: Tỷ lệ khách hàng mua trả góp khi dùng thẻ tín dụng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN p.payment_installments > 1 THEN 1 END) AS installment_payments, COUNT(*) AS total_payments, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.payment_installments > 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS installment_percentage FROM olist_order_payments p WHERE p.payment_type = 'credit_card' LIMIT 10

cases.question: Giá trị thanh toán trung bình theo từng phương thức thanh toán?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.payment_type, ROUND(AVG(p.payment_value), 2) AS avg_payment, COUNT(*) AS total_transactions FROM olist_order_payments p GROUP BY p.payment_type ORDER BY avg_payment DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Phân bổ số kỳ trả góp của đơn hàng dùng thẻ tín dụng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.payment_installments, COUNT(*) AS total_orders, ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_value FROM olist_order_payments p WHERE p.payment_type = 'credit_card' GROUP BY p.payment_installments ORDER BY p.payment_installments LIMIT 30

cases.question: Tổng giá trị giao dịch theo phương thức thanh toán theo từng năm?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS yr, p.payment_type, ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_value FROM olist_order_payments p JOIN olist_orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id GROUP BY year(o.order_purchase_timestamp), p.payment_type ORDER BY yr, total_value DESC LIMIT 30
cases.gold_sql_note: Không +7h cho dữ liệu lịch sử khi GROUP/FILTER, thêm LIMIT 30

cases.question: Đơn hàng có giá trị thanh toán cao nhất là bao nhiêu?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.order_id, ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_paid FROM olist_order_payments p GROUP BY p.order_id ORDER BY total_paid DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Top 10 thành phố có nhiều khách hàng nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_city, c.customer_state, COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_unique_id) AS total_customers FROM olist_customers c GROUP BY c.customer_city, c.customer_state ORDER BY total_customers DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Bang nào có nhiều đơn hàng nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Doanh thu theo từng bang của khách hàng, chỉ tính đơn đã giao?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Bang nào có nhiều người bán nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.seller_state, COUNT(DISTINCT s.seller_id) AS total_sellers FROM olist_sellers s GROUP BY s.seller_state ORDER BY total_sellers DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Khoảng cách mua hàng xuyên bang: số đơn hàng mà khách và người bán ở khác bang?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS cross_state_orders FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE c.customer_state <> s.seller_state LIMIT 10

cases.question: Hôm nay có bao nhiêu đơn hàng mới?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(order_id) AS total_orders_today FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim WHERE DATE(order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) = DATE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) LIMIT 10

cases.question: Chi tiết 10 đơn hàng mới nhất vừa vào hệ thống?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT rt.order_id, rt.customer_id, rt.order_status, rt.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS thoi_gian_vn FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim rt ORDER BY rt.order_purchase_timestamp DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Thống kê số đơn hàng realtime hôm nay theo từng trạng thái?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT rt.order_status, COUNT(rt.order_id) AS so_luong_don FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim rt WHERE DATE(rt.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) = DATE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) GROUP BY rt.order_status ORDER BY so_luong_don DESC LIMIT 20
cases.gold_sql_note: Thêm LIMIT 20 | alias/qualification aligned with system_prompt

cases.question: Đơn hàng mới hôm nay phân bổ theo từng giờ như thế nào?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT HOUR(order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) AS gio_vn, COUNT(order_id) AS so_don FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim WHERE DATE(order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) = DATE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) GROUP BY HOUR(order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) ORDER BY gio_vn LIMIT 24

cases.question: So sánh số đơn hàng hôm nay và hôm qua?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN DATE(order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) = DATE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) THEN 'Hôm nay' WHEN DATE(order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) = DATE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 7 HOURS - INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 'Hôm qua' ELSE 'Khác' END AS ngay, COUNT(order_id) AS tong_don_hang FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim WHERE DATE(order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) >= DATE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 7 HOURS - INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY ngay ORDER BY ngay DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: Khách hàng ở bang nào mua nhiều nhất trong dữ liệu realtime?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, COUNT(rt.order_id) AS total_rt_orders FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim rt JOIN ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_customers c ON rt.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY total_rt_orders DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: So sánh tổng số đơn hàng lịch sử và đơn hàng realtime?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT 'Lịch sử (2016-2018)' AS nguon_du_lieu, COUNT(order_id) AS so_luong_don FROM ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_orders UNION ALL SELECT 'Realtime (2026)' AS nguon_du_lieu, COUNT(order_id) AS so_luong_don FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim LIMIT 2

cases.question: Thành phố nào có nhiều đơn hàng realtime nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_city, c.customer_state, COUNT(rt.order_id) AS so_don_moi FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim rt JOIN ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_customers c ON rt.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_city, c.customer_state ORDER BY so_don_moi DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Thời điểm đơn hàng mới nhất trong hệ thống realtime là khi nào?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) AS latest_order_date_vn, COUNT(order_id) AS tong_don_hom_nay FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim WHERE DATE(order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) = DATE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) LIMIT 10

cases.question: Liệt kê toàn bộ đơn hàng hôm nay với thời gian theo giờ Việt Nam?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT rt.order_id, rt.customer_id, rt.order_status, DATE(rt.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) AS ngay_vn, HOUR(rt.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) AS gio_vn, rt.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS thoi_gian_vn FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim rt WHERE DATE(rt.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) = DATE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) ORDER BY rt.order_purchase_timestamp DESC LIMIT 200

cases.question: Khách hàng nào đã đặt hơn 3 đơn hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_unique_id, c.customer_city, c.customer_state, t.order_count FROM (SELECT o.customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count FROM olist_orders o GROUP BY o.customer_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) > 3) t JOIN olist_customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id ORDER BY t.order_count DESC LIMIT 20

cases.question: Danh mục sản phẩm nào có số lượng sản phẩm nhiều nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name_english AS category, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM olist_products p LEFT JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name GROUP BY t.product_category_name_english ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Đơn hàng nào có nhiều sản phẩm nhất (top 5)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.order_id, COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS item_count, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_value FROM olist_order_items oi GROUP BY oi.order_id ORDER BY item_count DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: Người bán nào chưa từng bị đánh giá dưới 3 sao?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE oi.seller_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT oi2.seller_id FROM olist_order_items oi2 JOIN olist_orders o ON oi2.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_order_reviews r ON o.order_id = r.order_id WHERE r.review_score < 3) LIMIT 20

cases.question: Tổng số đơn hàng toàn hệ thống (cả lịch sử lẫn realtime)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.tong_don_toan_he_thong FROM (SELECT (SELECT COUNT(o.order_id) FROM ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_orders o) + (SELECT COUNT(rt.order_id) FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim rt) AS tong_don_toan_he_thong) s LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: Single row - LIMIT 1, full path cho olist_orders | alias/qualification aligned with system_prompt

cases.question: Xếp hạng doanh thu theo bang của khách hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(oi.price) DESC) AS revenue_rank FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY revenue_rank LIMIT 30

cases.question: Doanh thu tích lũy theo tháng trong năm 2017?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT subq.month, subq.monthly_revenue, SUM(subq.monthly_revenue) OVER (ORDER BY subq.month ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_revenue FROM (SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS monthly_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2017 GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM')) subq ORDER BY subq.month LIMIT 20
cases.gold_sql_note: Không +7h khi group/filter dữ liệu lịch sử, thêm LIMIT 20 | alias/qualification aligned with system_prompt

cases.question: Xếp hạng người bán theo doanh thu trong từng bang?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.seller_state, oi.seller_id, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS revenue, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.seller_state ORDER BY SUM(oi.price) DESC) AS rank_in_state FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY s.seller_state, oi.seller_id ORDER BY s.seller_state, rank_in_state LIMIT 30

cases.question: Phân tích RFM: khách hàng mua lần cuối khi nào, mua bao nhiêu lần, chi tiêu tổng bao nhiêu?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_unique_id, MAX(o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) AS last_purchase_date_vn, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS frequency, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS monetary FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY c.customer_unique_id ORDER BY monetary DESC LIMIT 20
cases.gold_sql_note: Thêm +7h trên MAX timestamp (hiển thị cho user), WHERE delivered, LIMIT 20

cases.question: Phân tích tương quan giữa số kỳ trả góp và điểm đánh giá trung bình?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.payment_installments, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_review_score, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_payments p JOIN olist_orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_order_reviews r ON o.order_id = r.order_id WHERE p.payment_type = 'credit_card' GROUP BY p.payment_installments ORDER BY p.payment_installments LIMIT 30

cases.question: Top 5 danh mục sản phẩm có tỷ lệ giao trễ cao nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name_english AS category, COUNT(*) AS total_delivered, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_count, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_pct FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.product_category_name_english HAVING COUNT(*) >= 50 ORDER BY late_pct DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: Danh mục sản phẩm nào có cả doanh thu cao lẫn điểm đánh giá tốt (>= 4)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name_english AS category, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS revenue, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_score, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_order_reviews r ON o.order_id = r.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY t.product_category_name_english HAVING AVG(r.review_score) >= 4 ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Seller có tỉ lệ đơn hàng bị hủy cao nhất (ít nhất 20 đơn)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'canceled' THEN o.order_id END) AS canceled_orders, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'canceled' THEN o.order_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id), 2) AS cancel_rate FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id GROUP BY oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) >= 20 ORDER BY cancel_rate DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Top 10 sản phẩm bán chạy nhất theo số lượng đơn hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_category_name, t.product_category_name_english AS category_english, COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS total_sold FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_category_name, t.product_category_name_english ORDER BY total_sold DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Danh mục sản phẩm nào có trọng lượng trung bình cao nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name_english AS category, ROUND(AVG(p.product_weight_g), 1) AS avg_weight_g, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM olist_products p JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name WHERE p.product_weight_g IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.product_category_name_english ORDER BY avg_weight_g DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Danh mục có số lượng sản phẩm dưới 10 là những danh mục nào?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name_english AS category, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM olist_products p JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name GROUP BY t.product_category_name_english HAVING COUNT(p.product_id) < 10 ORDER BY product_count ASC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Tương quan giữa số ảnh sản phẩm và giá bán trung bình?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_photos_qty, ROUND(AVG(oi.price), 2) AS avg_price, COUNT(DISTINCT p.product_id) AS product_count FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_photos_qty IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.product_photos_qty ORDER BY p.product_photos_qty LIMIT 30

cases.question: Danh mục sản phẩm nào có phí vận chuyển trung bình cao nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name_english AS category, ROUND(AVG(oi.freight_value), 2) AS avg_freight FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name GROUP BY t.product_category_name_english ORDER BY avg_freight DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Người bán nào có số lượng đơn hàng nhiều nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Người bán nào bán nhiều danh mục sản phẩm nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, COUNT(DISTINCT p.product_category_name) AS category_count FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY oi.seller_id, s.seller_city ORDER BY category_count DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Tỷ lệ đơn hàng giao trễ của từng người bán (top 10 tệ nhất, ít nhất 50 đơn)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, COUNT(*) AS total_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_orders, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_rate FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state HAVING COUNT(*) >= 50 ORDER BY late_rate DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Doanh thu trung bình mỗi đơn hàng của từng người bán?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.price) / COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id), 2) AS avg_revenue_per_order FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state ORDER BY avg_revenue_per_order DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Seller mới (chỉ có đơn trong năm 2018) là những ai?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2018 AND oi.seller_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT oi2.seller_id FROM olist_order_items oi2 JOIN olist_orders o2 ON oi2.order_id = o2.order_id WHERE year(o2.order_purchase_timestamp) < 2018) LIMIT 20

cases.question: Xu hướng tăng trưởng đơn hàng theo từng tháng từ 2016-2018?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month LIMIT 40
cases.gold_sql_note: Không +7h cho dữ liệu lịch sử, thêm LIMIT 40

cases.question: Tỷ lệ đơn hàng được giao thành công theo từng tháng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(*) AS total_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'delivered' THEN 1 END) AS delivered_orders, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'delivered' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS delivery_rate FROM olist_orders o GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month LIMIT 40
cases.gold_sql_note: Không +7h cho dữ liệu lịch sử, thêm LIMIT 40

cases.question: Xu hướng điểm đánh giá trung bình theo từng quý?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT year(r.review_creation_date) AS yr, quarter(r.review_creation_date) AS qtr, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_score, COUNT(r.review_id) AS total_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r GROUP BY year(r.review_creation_date), quarter(r.review_creation_date) ORDER BY yr, qtr LIMIT 20
cases.gold_sql_note: Không +7h cho dữ liệu lịch sử, thêm LIMIT 20

cases.question: Doanh thu theo từng tháng trong năm 2018?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS monthly_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2018 GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month LIMIT 20

cases.question: Số lượng đánh giá theo từng ngày trong tháng 12/2017?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT DATE(r.review_creation_date) AS review_date, COUNT(r.review_id) AS total_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r WHERE year(r.review_creation_date) = 2017 AND month(r.review_creation_date) = 12 GROUP BY DATE(r.review_creation_date) ORDER BY review_date LIMIT 31
cases.gold_sql_note: Không +7h cho dữ liệu lịch sử, LIMIT 31 (max ngày/tháng)

cases.question: Sản phẩm nào được bán với giá cao nhất? Hiển thị danh mục và giá bán.
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_category_name, t.product_category_name_english AS category_english, MAX(oi.price) AS max_price_brl FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_category_name, t.product_category_name_english ORDER BY max_price_brl DESC LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: JOIN product + translation để hiển thị tên danh mục tiếng Anh, filter delivered

cases.question: Người bán nào có phí vận chuyển trung bình thấp nhất (với ít nhất 50 đơn hàng delivered)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, ROUND(AVG(oi.freight_value), 2) AS avg_freight, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) >= 50 ORDER BY avg_freight ASC LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: HAVING để lọc seller có đủ dữ liệu, ORDER BY ASC lấy freight thấp nhất

cases.question: Phân bổ khách hàng theo bang?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_unique_id) AS total_customers FROM olist_customers c GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY total_customers DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Tỷ lệ khách hàng quay lại mua hơn 1 lần?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN order_count > 1 THEN 1 END) AS repeat_customers, COUNT(*) AS total_customers, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN order_count > 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS repeat_rate FROM (SELECT c.customer_unique_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count FROM olist_customers c JOIN olist_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_unique_id) t LIMIT 10

cases.question: Thành phố nào có tổng chi tiêu khách hàng cao nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_city, c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_spent FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY c.customer_city, c.customer_state ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Tháng nào trong năm 2017 có nhiều khách hàng mới nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(first_purchase, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(*) AS new_customers FROM (SELECT c.customer_unique_id, MIN(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS first_purchase FROM olist_customers c JOIN olist_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_unique_id) t WHERE year(first_purchase) = 2017 GROUP BY date_format(first_purchase, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month LIMIT 20

cases.question: Khách hàng ở bang nào có thời gian chờ giao hàng trung bình lâu nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(AVG(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)), 1) AS avg_wait_days FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY avg_wait_days DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo từng trạng thái trong năm 2017?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o WHERE year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2017 GROUP BY o.order_status ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Số đơn hàng có nhiều hơn 5 sản phẩm?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS orders_with_5plus_items FROM (SELECT order_id FROM olist_order_items GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(order_item_id) > 5) subq LIMIT 10

cases.question: Tỷ lệ đơn hàng được duyệt (approved) trong vòng 1 ngày sau khi đặt?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN datediff(o.order_approved_at, o.order_purchase_timestamp) <= 1 THEN 1 END) AS fast_approved, COUNT(*) AS total_with_approval, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN datediff(o.order_approved_at, o.order_purchase_timestamp) <= 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS fast_approval_rate FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_approved_at IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10

cases.question: Đơn hàng nào có khoảng cách giữa ngày đặt và ngày giao dài nhất?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS thoi_gian_dat_vn, o.order_delivered_customer_date + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS thoi_gian_giao_vn, datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS total_days FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY total_days DESC LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql_note: Hiển thị timestamps +7h cho user, LIMIT 10

cases.question: Số đơn hàng trung bình mỗi ngày trong năm 2017?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) / COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(order_purchase_timestamp)), 1) AS avg_orders_per_day FROM olist_orders WHERE year(order_purchase_timestamp) = 2017 LIMIT 10
